accurate.why: Dollar figures cited ($159M, $3.01B, $370M, $5.714B for Corps; $1.773B Reclamation; $1.96B EERE, $8.39B Science) match the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: Claims it 'rescinds a total of $8.98 billion in previously appropriated unobligated funds to instead support nuclear energy projects' — the bill text excerpt mentions transferring balances but the exact $8.98B rescission figure cannot be verified from the provided bill text excerpt, and this specific claim appears to go beyond what the truncated text supports.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as FY2025 appropriations for energy and water development agencies.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes Natural Gas Act amendment, CALFED extension, and drought relief extension.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes reprogramming rules, work plan requirements, and policy restrictions.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers Corps, Interior, DOE, and independent agencies with specific figures.

concise.why: Quite detailed; the level of specificity with dollar amounts makes it lengthy.

correct_entities.why: Army Corps, Bureau of Reclamation, DOE, FERC correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: Corps figures ($159M, $3.01B, $370M, $5.714B), Reclamation ($1.773B), and DOE figures ($1.96B EERE, $8.39B Science) all match the bill text.
